message:
test(engine): enrichment tests for PLAS, specialization perf, and parallel interference gates

plas_release_gate.rs (+174 lines, FRX-10.9.6):
  Tests for deterministic PLAS cohort activation gate. Validates prioritized
  extension cohort checks: PLAS active authority control, signed capability
  witnesses, escrow-path replay evidence, and revocation/traceability
  guarantees. Clone equality and serde roundtrip tests.

specialization_perf_release_gate.rs (+142 lines, FRX-10.9.9):
  Tests for proof-specialized execution path performance validation. Verifies
  positive performance delta versus ambient-authority paths with 100%
  specialization-receipt coverage and deterministic fallback correctness.

parallel_interference_gate.rs (+209 lines, FRX-3rjg):
  Tests for parallel parser determinism gate (bd-1vfi). Validates deterministic
  results across seeds, schedules, and worker counts. Detects nondeterminism
  and verifies serial fallback enforcement on parity violations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
